creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #16)

Thanks for reply, I did in fact remove all *kmod* ports when testing drm-kmod (non-legacy) and it did in fact pull in drm-fbsd12.0-kmod as dependency. Just a moment ago tried the same - same result as above. Only thing I haven't tried is a GENERIC kernel, maybe some module is missing, though I do have linuxkpi and even linux / linux64 - no difference.
